news.headline: Beacon Global Strategies ranked top in Political Risk by Chambers Crisis & Risk Management, scoring 5 out of 5 in client services.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Beacon Global Strategies (BGS) was recognized as a top firm in Political Risk on a global scale in the latest Chambers Crisis & Risk Management edition. The company achieved a perfect score of 5 out of 5 in the client services category.

news.headline: Goodwill & GM partner: $750,000 grant for EV training & skilled trades programs in U.S. Boosting clean energy jobs.
news.summary: A sizeable grant of $750,000 has been awarded by General Motors (GM) to support the development of new skilled trades programs, particularly in electric vehicle charging training, across the United States. This collaboration between GM and Goodwill, a prominent workforce development organization, aims to bolster clean energy initiatives. The announcement was made in Rockville, Maryland, on June 28, 2024. This funding signals a deepening partnership between the two entities as they work to advance workforce skills in alignment with the shifting landscape towards cleaner technologies.

news.headline: Edustaff teams up w/ Monona Grove School District in MI to supply subs & paraprofessionals, aiding in expanding workforce.
news.summary: In a recent development on June 28, 2024, in Grand Rapids, Michigan, Edustaff announced its collaboration with Monona Grove School District. The partnership aims to offer substitute teachers and paraprofessionals for the schools within the district. This strategic move by Edustaff will assist the Monona Grove School District in expanding their available pool of educators, ensuring more comprehensive coverage for their academic requirements.

news.headline: Edustaff partners with Wright City R-II School District in Michigan to provide substitute teachers and paraprofessionals.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Edustaff and Wright City R-II School District in Michigan as of June 28, 2024. Edustaff will be providing substitute teachers and paraprofessionals for the schools in the district. This collaboration aims to assist the Wright City R-II School District in expanding its pool of educators.

news.headline: Chicago PMI for US came in at 47.4, beating expectations of 40 and surpassing the previous 35.4.
Tesla's China rivals aiming for sales recovery with new models. Nio set to double EV sales, BYD targeting one million.
news.summary: Nio is anticipated to see a significant increase in electric vehicle sales, potentially doubling their numbers. Meanwhile, BYD is projected to reach a milestone of one million sales. Competing with Tesla in China, both Nio and BYD are looking to boost sales by introducing more affordable models. This move may help them recover sales volumes, as per reports from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: PTC Therapeutics stock tumbles after European regulators reject Duchenne muscular dystrophy drug; shares fall early Friday.
news.summary: Once more, European regulators have denied approval for PTC Therapeutics' Duchenne muscular dystrophy medication, causing a sharp decline in the company's stock on Friday. The rejection of the drug led to a significant drop in PTC's stock value during early trading hours.

news.headline: Investors favor Trump-backed DJT after Biden's debate performance flop, per post-debate consensus.
news.summary: On Thursday, both Donald Trump and President Joe Biden participated in a debate hosted by CNN. Following Biden's widely criticized debate performance, market predictions are now favoring the Trump-backed DJT, as reported by Investor's Business Daily. This shift in sentiment reflects the impact of the debate on the upcoming election, with key numbers indicating a change in market expectations.

news.headline: Alphabet's stock was downgraded due to analyst's six noted risks for Google.
Fed inflation rate rises at slowest pace since late 2020, sparking hopes for rate cuts; S&P 500 climbs.
news.summary: The latest Federal Reserve inflation rate experienced its smallest increase since the end of 2020. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 saw a rise as investors considered the potential effects of rate cuts. These developments have bolstered hopes for a decrease in interest rates.

news.headline: 7 stocks, 5 ETFs react as Fed's inflation rate hits 3-year low at 2.6% in May, sparking expectations of rate cuts.
news.summary: Trading in U.S. equity index futures saw a slight uptick in premarket sessions on Friday post the release of May’s Personal Consumption Expenditure (PCE) figures, the Federal Reserve’s preferred inflation measure, showing a 2.6% year-on-year drop, meeting expectations. This marks the lowest inflation rate recorded since March 2021, influencing market sentiments towards anticipated Fed interest rate reductions. Subsequent to the PCE report, traders showed a heightened inclination towards a potential rate cut in September, with increased speculation in this direction. This development has been closely watched by market participants as they position themselves based on these dynamics.

news.headline: Dow Jones rises post-inflation data; Nike stock drops 18% due to earnings. Market fluctuates.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a positive turn as the Dow Jones index made a recovery following the release of significant inflation figures. Notably, Nike stock faced a sharp drop of 18% due to disappointing earnings. This information was reported without attribution.

news.headline: Bitcoin's post-halving dip may be ending, leading to potential exponential gains, as historical data shows gains of +12,100%, +4,000%, and +700% in previous cycles.
news.summary: An experienced trader in the cryptocurrency market has suggested that Bitcoin's recent dip after the halving may be coming to an end, indicating a potential price surge. The trader highlighted that past post-halving dips have actually been opportunities for investors to accumulate more. Many mistakenly interpret these dips as signs of a distribution or market peak, leading them to sell prematurely. Referring to historical data, the trader emphasized the gains missed by early sellers in previous halving cycles: +12,100% in 2012, +4,000% in 2016, and +700% in 2020. This positive outlook and potential rally come amidst ongoing market fluctuations and uncertainties.

news.headline: AllyGPO™ partners with IDEOlogy Health for medical education expansion for oncology practices.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between AllyGPO™, a specialty Group Purchasing Organization, and IDEOlogy Health in Tempe, Arizona and Austin, Texas. This collaboration aims to offer multi-channel medical education to oncology practice members. The announcement was made on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Skanska signs $75M contract in the US healthcare sector, equivalent to SEK 790M, boosting Q2 order bookings.
news.summary: In Stockholm on June 28, 2024, Skanska announced a new deal with a healthcare customer in the Northwestern US valued at $75 million (approximately SEK 790 million). This contract will be reflected in the US order bookings for the second quarter of 2024. The project is currently in progress and is expected to be finished as per schedule.

news.headline: Blockchain expert Fanny Philip joins Bitfarms' Board of Directors, bolstering leadership with her finance knowledge.
news.summary: Fanny Philip, an expert in blockchain technology and finance, has recently been appointed to the Board of Directors of Bitfarms. The addition of Philip to the board aims to strengthen the leadership team of the company.

news.headline: Political buy reported: N/A purchased 175,000 shares worth $100,001-$250,000 from undisclosed source on June 21, 2024; filed on June 27, 2024.
Political trade disclosed: NEE purchased between $1,000 and $15,000 worth of stock (8000 shares) on June 24, 2024, per June 27 filing.
NSRGY stock traded at $1,000-$15,000. Marjorie Taylor involved in undisclosed transaction on 06-24, filed on 06-27.
Political trade involving undisclosed amount between LULU, estimated $1,000-$15,000, stock 8000, by Marjorie Taylor on 2024-06-24; filed on 2024-06-27.
Recent insider trade disclosed: CRWD stock purchase between $1,000 to $15,000 by Marjorie Taylor on June 24, 2024, filed on June 27, 2024.
Political trade reveals undisclosed purchase of COST stock worth $1,000-$15,000 by Marjorie Taylor on 06/24/2024, filed on 06/27/2024.
ASML acquisition: undisclosed purchase worth $1,000-$15,000, 8000 shares bought by Marjorie Taylor on June 24, filed June 27, 2024.
The Good Shroom records Q3 revenue decrease of 10.3% YoY, net profit remains positive, with sales down to $1,135,991.
news.summary: Quebec-based company The Good Shroom (TSTX:MUSH) revealed its financial performance for the quarter ending on April 30, 2024, including results for its subsidiary Teonan Biomedical Inc. CEO Eric Ronsse mentioned that despite market challenges, the company achieved consistent profitability this quarter, marking its fifth consecutive profitable quarter. Year-over-year financial highlights show a slight decrease in quarterly sales, with gross revenue totaling $1,135,991 this quarter compared to $1,266,186 in the same period last year, representing a decrease of around 10.3%. The company demonstrated resilience and operational efficiency amidst the challenging market conditions.

news.headline: First of Long Island Corp (Nasdaq: FLIC) declares $.21/share dividend for 2nd quarter, payable on July 18 to shareholders on record as of July 10.
news.summary: In Melville, NY, on June 28, 2024, the First of Long Island Corporation (Nasdaq: FLIC) disclosed a cash dividend of $0.21 per share for the second quarter. Shareholders as of July 10, 2024, are eligible for the dividend payout scheduled for July 18, 2024.

news.headline: New high-end specialty restaurant, Love by Britto, opens on Sun Princess with fusion of Romero Britto art and Rudi Sodamin cuisine. - PRNewswire, June 28, 2024.
news.summary: Renowned artist Romero Britto and celebrated chef Rudi Sodamin have teamed up to create an exceptional dining experience on Princess Cruises' Sun Princess. The new restaurant, Love by Britto, officially opened in Ft. Lauderdale, Florida on June 28, 2024. This fusion of art and culinary expertise promises a sensational dining experience for guests aboard the cruise ship. It blends Britto's iconic style with Sodamin's culinary mastery, offering a unique culinary gem for travelers to enjoy.

news.headline: Pyxis Tankers closed a joint venture for a 2015-built dry bulk carrier, investing $7.3M cash and issuing 267,857 restricted common shares for a 60% ownership stake. The vessel, "Konkar Venture," has an 82,099 dwt capacity and is under charter at $18,000 per day until mid-August 2024. Post-acquisition, the company is estimated to have $43.0M in total cash and $89.0M in funded debt.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Pyxis Tankers Inc. (NASDAQ Cap Mkts: PXS), an international shipping company, finalized a joint venture to acquire and operate the “Konkar Venture”, an 82,099 dwt Kamsarmax carrier built in 2015. The Company contributed $7.3 million in cash and will issue 267,857 restricted common shares, securing a 60% stake in the venture. The vessel is currently under a time charter earning $18,000 per day until mid-August, 2024. Following the transaction and related expenses, Pyxis Tankers Inc. is expected to have about $43.0 million in consolidated cash, including $2.2 million in restricted cash, and approximately $89.0 million in funded debt.

news.headline: Gildan named in Corporate Knights' Best 50 Corporate Citizens & TIME's Most Sustainable Companies, only Canadian textile firm.
news.summary: In Montreal on June 28, 2024, Gildan Activewear Inc. (GIL: TSX and NYSE) announced that it has been honored as one of the Best 50 Corporate Citizens in Canada by Corporate Knights for the third year in a row. Gildan stands out as the sole company from the Textiles & Clothing Manufacturing sector to make the list. Furthermore, Gildan has also secured a spot in the first-ever TIME's World Most Sustainable Companies list, joining just 12 Canadian companies on this worldwide recognition.

news.headline: Europe cement industry prices set to rise in 2023, output increasing from $32.67B in 2022 to reach $38.26B by 2027 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report on the Europe Cement Industry Market projects a steady growth rate of 3.4% annually, with the industry estimated to reach a value of US$33.76 billion by 2023. The report covers over 50 market segments, detailing aspects such as cement products, distribution channels, market share, import-export activities, and end markets. The resilience of the industry's medium to long-term growth prospects in the European region is a key highlight. The report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: ORYZON Genomics held its 2024 AGM in Madrid with 27,110,751 shares (42.6867% of total) represented in person or by proxy.
news.summary: Oryzon Genomics, S.A., a biopharmaceutical company based in Madrid and Cambridge, announced the outcomes of its recent Annual General Meeting of Shareholders held in Madrid on June 28, 2024. At the meeting, a significant portion of the company's shares were represented, with a total of 27,110,751 common shares in attendance either by physical presence or proxy. This number represents approximately 42.6867% of the corporation's issued and outstanding shares. Oryzon Genomics focuses on utilizing epigenetics to develop therapies for diseases facing substantial unmet medical needs.

news.headline: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) gets positive opinion for conditional approval of odronextamab for lymphoma in Europe.
news.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc (NASDAQ:REGN) recently reported that the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use recommended conditional approval of odronextamab for relapsed/refractory (R/R) follicular lymphoma or R/R diffuse large B-cell lymphoma in cases where two or more lines of systemic therapy have been unsuccessful. Relapsed/refractory (R/R) follicular lymphoma signifies the return of FL post initial treatment or failure to respond to treatment. Likewise, R/R diffuse large B-cell lymphoma denotes instances where DLBCL relapses or shows resistance to therapy. The European Commission is anticipated to proceed with approval.

news.headline: North American retailer invests 90 MSEK in Pricer Plaza for automation, to be implemented in initial 50 stores.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Stockholm, it was announced that JRTech Solutions, a partner of Pricer, has secured a deal with a major Tier 1 grocery retailer in North America. The agreement is for the implementation of Pricer Plaza, a cloud-based platform enabling in-store automation and communication. Initially, this will be rolled out in 50 stores of the retailer. This partnership signifies a significant step towards enhancing operational efficiency in the retail sector.

news.headline: Rumble's debate night in America sets new record with 718,909 peak concurrent viewers and bandwidth record on CDN network.
news.summary: In Longboat Key, Florida, on June 28, 2024, Rumble (NASDAQ:RUM), a video-sharing platform and cloud services provider, achieved a new milestone during the recent debate night in America. Content creators discussed the highly anticipated matchup between President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump, attracting a record-breaking 718,909 concurrent live viewers on Rumble. This peak viewership marked the highest number ever reached on the platform, as reported by Streams Charts, a third-party streaming analytics firm. Additionally, Rumble set a new record for bandwidth throughput on its Content Delivery Network during this event.

news.headline: "2024's Project Yellow Light awards 8 students scholarships for anti-distracted driving PSAs. Winners selected nationwide."
news.summary: Eight students from different parts of the country have been granted scholarships for their outstanding creative work in TV, radio, and billboard advertisements. The recipients were revealed by the Ad Council and Project Yellow Light during the 13th year of the annual Project Yellow Light scholarship competition held in New York on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: DanceOne partners with Julianne and Derek Hough to launch global ballroom dance convention and competition tour in Los Angeles.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based company DanceOne has announced a partnership with renowned dancers Julianne and Derek Hough to introduce a cutting-edge global ballroom dance convention and competition tour. This collaboration aims to revolutionize the dance industry by showcasing top talent around the world, with an expected reach of thousands of participants and spectators. The event will feature a series of competitions and workshops led by industry experts, creating a platform for aspiring dancers to showcase their skills and network with professionals. The convention is set to kick off in multiple cities across the globe, promising a unique and immersive experience for dance enthusiasts everywhere.

news.headline: Blackstone Real Estate and MRP Group raise offer price for all-cash tender for Terrafina to Ps.40.50 per share, 27% premium.
news.summary: In an announcement made today by Blackstone Real Estate and MRP Group, a real estate developer in Mexico, it was disclosed that a Mexican trust established by their associates has raised the tender offer price for acquiring up to 100% of the outstanding real estate trust certificates of Terrafina (BMV:TERRA 13). The price increment amounts to Ps.1.00 per certificate, resulting in a revised purchase price of Ps.40.50 per certificate. This all-cash tender offer signifies a premium of 27% over the original price per T.

news.headline: Ferrari completes 4th tranche of 2 billion Euro share buyback program, announces 5th tranche. Euro 350 million spent.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Maranello, Italy, Ferrari N.V. disclosed that it has acquired common shares worth Euro 350 million as part of its share buyback program. This buyback is the fourth tranche of a larger program totaling approximately Euro 2 billion, slated to be completed by 2026 as outlined during the 2022 Capital Markets Day. The purchased shares are being reported daily on the Euronext Milan (EXM) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE). This initiative aims to enhance shareholder value and demonstrate the company's fiscal strength.

news.headline: Cingulate Inc. announces exercise of warrants for $1.86M gross proceeds through stock offerings, with about 3,187,500 shares involved.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Kansas City, Kansas, Cingulate Inc. (NASDAQ: CING), a biopharmaceutical company, disclosed that it has finalized agreements for the immediate exercise of specific Series A warrants for the purchase of up to 2,125,000 common stock shares and Series B warrants for up to 1,062,500 common stock shares. Originally released in February 2023 with an exercise price of $2.00 per share, the warrants will now be exercised at a reduced price of $0.585 per share. These shares are part of the Company's pipeline of pharmaceutical products and are registered under an effective registration statement on Form S-1 (No. 333-276502). The closing of this offering is expected around July 1, 2024, pending standard closing conditions.

news.headline: Paubox introduces attachment support for HIPAA compliant texting, allowing healthcare providers to securely send files.
news.summary: A company based in San Francisco, Paubox, known for its HIPAA compliant email and texting services, has introduced a major update to Paubox Texting. This enhancement enables users to send attachments through the platform. Healthcare professionals can now securely share documents, images, and various files in their text communications, ensuring adherence to stringent HIPAA compliance regulations. This new feature in Paubox Texting empowers healthcare providers to send crucial information securely, further bolstering their ability to communicate effectively.

news.headline: Bitdeer Technologies (NASDAQ:BTDR) secures lease for 570 MW capacity, increasing total to 2.5 GW, boosting Bitcoin mining capabilities.
news.summary: Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ:BTDR) saw an increase in shares trading on Friday following the announcement of a lease agreement with the Monroe County Port Authority (MCPA). The agreement secures up to 570 MW of additional power capacity for Bitdeer. The lease, spanning 30 years, grants them access to land at the Hannibal Industrial Park in Clarington, Ohio, owned by the MCPA. This site offers advantages such as existing power infrastructure, utility switchyards, and transmission capabilities suitable for supporting hyperscale loads. With this new agreement, Bitdeer's total capacity rises to 2.5 GW globally, enhancing the company's infrastructure development for Bitcoin mining, high-performance computing (HPC), and AI. This move signals a significant progression for Bitdeer in expanding its operations and strengthening its position in the industry.

news.headline: Tucows appoints Ivan Ivanov new CFO, taking over from Dave Singh, effective from August 5, 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Tucows Inc., a prominent global internet services company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol TCX and on TSX under TC, disclosed the appointment of Ivan Ivanov as their incoming Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Ivanov is set to take over the position from Dave Singh starting August 5, 2024. Singh, a longstanding member of Tucows, has served in the role prior to the transition.

news.headline: Fed inflation rate rose at slowest pace this year, sparking rate-cut hopes; S&P 500 futures rose.
news.summary: The latest Federal Reserve inflation rate showed the smallest increase so far this year, sparking hopes of a potential rate cut. As a result, S&P 500 futures saw an increase as investors considered the implications of this development. This news suggests a positive outlook for the market as traders anticipate changes in interest rates.

news.headline: Andronaco Industries acquires Diamond Fiberglass Systems, enhancing its fluid management capabilities in flow control.
news.summary: In Victoria, Texas on June 28, 2024, Andronaco Industries, a top supplier of corrosion-resistant flow control products, has successfully taken over Diamond Companies - Diamond Fiberglass. This acquisition marks a significant move as Diamond Fiberglass is recognized for its high-quality fluid management vessels.

news.headline: Adthena introduces Ask Arlo, a real-time AI data analysis tool for marketers. Revolutionizing search insights.
news.summary: In London on June 28, 2024, Adthena, a prominent provider of search intelligence for enterprise brands, unveiled a significant update to Ask Arlo. This innovative conversational AI tool aims to transform how marketers engage with and extract insights from their search data. This update marks a milestone in the evolution of the tool, promising to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of marketing strategies.

news.headline: Nigeria's SEC assesses local crypto industry worth $400M. Exchanges and traders given 30 days for re-registration.
news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) recently issued a directive for crypto exchanges and digital asset traders to re-register their businesses within 30 days. Failure to do so may result in enforcement actions being taken against them.

news.headline: BFG acquires VG Supply, leading distributor of lawn and garden supplies in the upper Midwest, expanding its presence.
news.summary: In Burton, Ohio, on June 28, 2024, BFG revealed the acquisition of VG Supply, a prominent distributor of lawn, garden, and outdoor living supplies in the upper Midwest. This move further solidifies BFG's position in the region and expands its reach, enhancing its offerings to customers. This acquisition aligns with BFG's growth strategy, leveraging VG Supply's established presence and expertise in the market.

news.headline: Allurion priced public offering of 14.4M shares and warrants at $1.20/share, raising $17.3M. Also concurrent private placement.
news.summary: In Natick, Massachusetts, Allurion Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: ALUR) has disclosed the pricing details of a recent underwritten public offering. This offering involves 14,406,508 shares of its common stock with each share valued at $0.0001 per share. Additionally, warrants to purchase the same number of shares have also been made available. The public offering price for each share has been set at $1.20, resulting in total gross proceeds amounting to $17.3 million before deducting expenses. Allurion Technologies is a company focused on tackling obesity-related issues.

news.headline: MSC Industrial (NYSE:MSM) to report Q3 earnings on July 2, with expected EPS of $1.34 (down from $1.74 last year) and revenue of $982.22 million. Analysts downgraded stock, now offers 4.26% annual dividend yield.
news.summary: MSC Industrial Direct Co., Inc. (NYSE:MSM) is preparing to unveil its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, July 2. Analysts anticipate the Oregon-based company to announce earnings of $1.34 per share, a decline from $1.74 per share the previous year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to reach $982.22 million. On June 17, Loop Capital's Chris Dankert downgraded MSC Industrial from Buy to Hold, while Keybanc's Ken Newman shifted the stock from Overweight to Sector Weight. The company's current annual dividend yield stands at 4.26%, offering a quarterly dividend of 83 ...Investors are keeping an eye on MSC Industrial for potential gains from dividends.

news.headline: Senegal's new President Faye has dialed down pre-election talk, shaping the country's political landscape.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the global pandemic has led to a significant increase in the number of confirmed cases, with over 10 million people now infected worldwide. This surge in cases has resulted in over 500,000 deaths across the globe. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help prevent further spread of the virus. Additionally, there are concerns about a potential shortage of medical supplies and hospital beds as healthcare systems become overwhelmed. Governments are implementing various measures to combat the spread of the virus and support those affected by the ongoing crisis.

news.headline: Sea-Doo advises on top 5 watercraft safety tips as boating season peak nears in North America.
news.summary: Valcourt, Quebec, June 28, 2024 - As one of the busiest boating weekends approaches, Sea-Doo, a brand under BRP Inc., is emphasizing the importance of safety for all riders. With the North American summer boating season at its peak, a surge in the number of individuals participating in water activities is expected.
